CustomField.label: Parse Degraded
CustomField.description: True when the parser could not extract structured fields and a fallback (body-only) fingerprint was used instead. The event still flows through dedup and diagnosis; this flag surfaces format drift so it never fails silently.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set when structured parsing failed and a coarse, body-only fingerprint was used. The agent diagnoses from the raw sample.
